---
title: "Cycle"
---

The `.cycle` style arranges items as arc-shaped arrows around a ring, each pointing to the next and the last looping back to the first. It is the classic "process wheel" for continuous, repeating processes. Like all styles in this extension, it is activated via `filters: [diagrams]`.

::: callout-tip
For nodes positioned on a ring connected by separate arrows, use [`.circle-flow`](circle-flow.qmd) instead. `.cycle` makes the stages *themselves* the arrows.
:::

## Basic usage

````markdown
::: cycle
::: item
Plan
:::
::: item
Do
:::
::: item
Check
:::
::: item
Act
:::
:::
````

::: cycle
::: item
Plan
:::
::: item
Do
:::
::: item
Check
:::
::: item
Act
:::
:::

## Any number of stages

The ring divides evenly across however many items you provide.

````markdown
::: cycle
::: item
Strategy
:::
::: item
Design
:::
::: item
Build
:::
::: item
Test
:::
::: item
Launch
:::
::: item
Review
:::
:::
````

::: cycle
::: item
Strategy
:::
::: item
Design
:::
::: item
Build
:::
::: item
Test
:::
::: item
Launch
:::
::: item
Review
:::
:::

## Colors

Use `node-color=` on the container to set the base color for all segments, or `color=` on an individual item to override a single segment.

````markdown
::: {.cycle node-color="#7a3b5c"}
::: item
Build
:::
::: {.item color="#3b7a5c"}
Measure
:::
::: item
Learn
:::
:::
````

::: {.cycle node-color="#7a3b5c"}
::: item
Build
:::
::: {.item color="#3b7a5c"}
Measure
:::
::: item
Learn
:::
:::

## Annotations

Give any item a nested `.annotation` div to attach an external callout that
points at its segment with a leader line. The annotation content is free-form
Markdown; any bold text or heading is tinted to match the segment color, which
is handy for a title (but optional). Annotate all, some, or none of the segments.

Nest the fenced divs with **more colons on the outer fences** (`:::::` for the
chart, `::::` for each item, `:::` for the annotation) and leave a blank line
around the inner fences.

````markdown
::::: cycle

:::: item
Collect

::: annotation
**Collect** gather raw data from all available sources
:::

::::

:::: item
Clean

::: annotation
**Clean** remove errors and standardize the format
:::

::::

:::: item
Analyze

::: annotation
**Analyze** find patterns and extract insights
:::

::::

:::: item
Report

::: annotation
**Report** share findings with stakeholders
:::

::::

:::::
````

::::: cycle

:::: item
Collect

::: annotation
**Collect** gather raw data from all available sources
:::

::::

:::: item
Clean

::: annotation
**Clean** remove errors and standardize the format
:::

::::

:::: item
Analyze

::: annotation
**Analyze** find patterns and extract insights
:::

::::

:::: item
Report

::: annotation
**Report** share findings with stakeholders
:::

::::

:::::
